blocks.label: Request for Quotation
Electrical Installation

variables.label: Main DB
variables.delegateText: Propose main DB for total connected load.

blocks.label: Standards
blocks.text:
NEN 1010, NEN 3140, NEN-EN 50110-1, NEN-EN 12464-1, NEN 2535 (if appl.), Bouwbesluit.
Erkend Installateur required. SCIOS inspection.
Attach: installer cert, NEN 1010 plan, Dialux calc.

blocks.label: Execution Terms

variables.label: Duration
variables.delegateText: State estimated duration and resource availability.

blocks.label: Price Structure
blocks.text:
Complete price breakdown required:

Lump sum complete, or itemised:
Per piece: DB, luminaire, socket, switch
Per m1: cable, tray/conduit
Lump sum: fire alarm, testing
Per hour: variations

Validity: minimum {{validityDays}} days.
State if prices subject to material index.

Payment: {{paymentDays}} days after invoice.

Surcharges not stated are deemed included and cannot be invoiced separately.

blocks.label: Scope Exclusions
blocks.text:
Excluded (procured separately by STM):

- Grid connection
- Structural works
- Finishes
- Solar/PV
- IT/data cabling
- Access control/CCTV
- VAT

Supplier shall state additional exclusions. Items not listed and not excluded by Supplier are deemed included.

Installation instructions and documentation provided at no additional cost.

blocks.label: Submission
blocks.text:
Submit to {{stmContact}} at {{stmEmail}} before {{deadline}}.

Include:
1. Price schedule
2. Design verification
3. Dialux calc
4. Single-line diagram
5. Equipment specs
6. NEN 1010 plan
7. Installer cert
8. Duration
9. General terms
10. Deviations

Incomplete quotations may be rejected.
STM is not obligated to award to lowest bidder.
This RFQ does not constitute a commitment to order.
